name: item-dropdown
visual_summary: An item-dropdown is a component typically consisting of a trigger button or icon and a dropdown list. It appears on a page when the trigger is clicked and disappears when the user interacts with other components. Developers use an item-dropdown to provide users with a concise list of actions or options related to a specific item.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready dropdown component with the following characteristics:

Name: item-dropdown
Description: An item-dropdown is a component typically consisting of a trigger button or icon and a dropdown list. It appears on a page when the trigger is clicked and disappears when the user interacts with other components. Developers use an item-dropdown to provide users with a concise list of actions or options related to a specific item.
Style: e.g. outlined, filled, hover-effect
Interactions: e.g. animated, clickable, responsive
Tags: dropdown, trigger, options

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
